generated_oml:
instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures position of the lab-scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CranePositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures speed of the lab-scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CranePositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

instance CraneSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneSpeedSensor
]

instance CranePositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from lab-scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Speed data from lab-scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Logs crane state data to TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CranePositionData, CraneSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based interface for collecting data from crane controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CranePositionData, CraneSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance GitHubVersionControl : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Manages version control via GitHub repositories"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance ContainerizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Employs containerization technologies for code dissemination"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance ArchitectureVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Uses C4 Model for architectural visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4Model
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for system optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemOptimizationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization for monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to ensure model accuracy against physical system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight, ContinuousValidationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection for identifying anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictionInsight, FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance RuntimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime visualization capabilities for indoor air quality management in virus spread prevention scenarios"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation capabilities for indoor air quality management in virus spread prevention scenarios"
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction capabilities for indoor air quality management in virus spread prevention scenarios"
]

instance SystemOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System optimization through optimal control"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Traceability through historical data logging"
]

instance ContinuousValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ensuring model accuracy against physical system behavior"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identifying anomalies for fault detection"
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Architectural visualization using context and container diagrams to define software components and their interactions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ArchitectureVisualizationEnabler
]

instance MechanicalStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Mechanical structure of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance CraneSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane operating in research and educational environment"
    base:contains MechanicalStructure, CraneController, CranePositionSensor, CraneSpeedSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are generated by the Control Application (Python) and transmitted to the Physical Crane through the Physical Crane Interface."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Services communicate via an MQTT broker for signaling."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar employs the AutomationML standard [14] for digital twin modeling, with Microsoft Azure tools used for pipeline implementation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Continuous Validation Service continuously compares measurements of executed trajectories with simulations of those same trajectories, calculates distance metrics against an acceptable threshold, and notifies operators via the Grafana dashboard upon threshold breaches to ensure safe operation."
]
